creator: kris@hub.freebsd.org
text:
On Sat, 22 Jan 2000 mharo@area51.fremont.ca.us wrote:

> Changes:
> 	- New version (1.94.4 -> 1.94.5)
> 
> I'm not sure if any of the patches should be removed.
> make patch works fine though, so I'm assuming that
> all is well.

Hmm, that sounds like they haven't actually fixed the security bugs then.
I'll have to look into that further.

> portlint: 18 warnings, 0 errors
> patches:  0 new, 0 removed

That's a lot of warnings :-)

Kris

"Eight!"
"That was a rhetorical question!"
